title: Boxer Nedbank Greenbacks Competition
summary: Boxer shoppers can enter for monthly Nedbank Greenbacks prizes through this live retail promotion. It is a practical cash-style reward for everyday spending rather than a one-off jackpot.
entrySteps: Open the competition page, check the Boxer purchase rules, and follow the promoter's entry instructions.

title: RAM Couriers - Vodacom Bulls
summary: This promo pairs a vehicle giveaway with an extra cash prize, making it one of the stronger mixed-value draws in the current lineup. It is tied to the Vodacom Bulls brand partnership and uses a form-based entry route.
entrySteps: Open the listing, complete the entry form, and follow the official campaign terms before submitting.

title: aQuellé Mzansi Mango Competition
summary: aQuellé is running a vehicle-led promotion with a Suzuki Swift as the headline prize. It is a strong lifestyle draw for people looking for mainstream brand campaigns with a clear closing date.
entrySteps: Visit the promo page, confirm the qualifying purchase steps, and submit your entry using the official campaign mechanics.

title: Revlon Fragrance Take Scentre Stage Matric Dance 2026 Competition
summary: Revlon is promoting a beauty-focused prize bundle built around matric dance prep vouchers. It is a useful retail giveaway for shoppers looking for style and self-care rewards rather than big-ticket items.
entrySteps: Open the offer page, read the qualifying purchase instructions, and enter through the official Revlon promo flow.

title: SPAR WIN A CAR
summary: SPAR's current car campaign is one of the biggest mainstream retail draws available, with multiple Hyundai vehicles on offer. It is exactly the kind of high-visibility promo that gives the cars category real depth.
entrySteps: Open the SPAR-linked competition page, check the qualifying spend or product rules, and enter before the closing date.

title: Cruise Nicely this Easter!
summary: This travel promotion offers a cruise prize instead of a simple voucher, which makes it one of the stronger holiday-style entries on the hub. It is a clear fit for users chasing experience-led rewards.
entrySteps: Open the campaign page, review the purchase or entry requirements, and complete the steps listed by the promoter.

title: Nestle NIDO 3+ Grow with Love Campaign Competition
summary: Nestlé's NIDO campaign is built around Clicks cashback, making it useful for shoppers who prefer practical rewards they can actually use. It is a good example of a retail-linked prize that still feels low-friction to enter.
entrySteps: Visit the competition page, confirm the qualifying purchase details, and follow the brand's listed entry process.

title: Gummy Vites Back to School Competition

summary: This Clicks-linked electronics promotion is centered on iPads, making it a solid tech prize for shoppers who want a recognisable brand reward. It also brings some urgency because the closing date is one of the nearer ones in the dataset.
entrySteps: Open the official promotion listing, read the participation rules, and submit your qualifying entry before it closes.

title: Sta Soft Clicks In Store Luxury Getaway Competition
